signals.headline: US-Iran Peace Talks Collapse in Pakistan: VP Vance, Kushner Announce Failure After 21-Hour Marathon** | **NO** | **HIGH*
signals.raw:
US-Iran Peace Talks Collapse in Pakistan: VP Vance, Kushner Announce Failure After 21-Hour Marathon** | **NO** | **HIGH** confidence[1][2][5]

US Vice President JD Vance, flanked by Jared Kushner and Steve Witkoff, confirmed on April 12, 2026, that marathon negotiations in Islamabad ended without a deal, citing Iran's refusal to accept US terms on uranium extraction, Strait of Hormuz reopening, an
matched_markets: Will Jared Kushner have a diplomatic meeting with Iran by April 30?
Will 40 ships transit the Strait of Hormuz on any day by April 30?
